title: Random Plant Heights
description: Sugar canes, cacti, and vines have variable heights
body:
This mod is now part of [Fundamental](https://modrinth.com/mod/fundamental) and will not be updated anymore

This is a very simple mod that randomises the maximum height of cacti & sugar canes (between 2 & 4 blocks) to make plants in the wild look more natural

It also prevents vines from growing forever

![Sugar canes with random maximum heights](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/317/325/2020-10-18_10.png)
